pitch_rationale: Area-weighted across 9 roof segments from Google Solar API (imageryQuality=HIGH): 36.01° → 9:12. Solar's underlying DSM model reports ~5° MAE in published benchmarks (Satellite Sunroof, NeurIPS 2024).
footprint_rationale: The subject home is identified by the orange bounding box and reticle, centering on a cluster-style townhouse unit. The orange box spans approximately 194 px (E-W) × 248 px (N-S). The actual roof terminates roughly 50 px above the bottom of the box (yard/landscaping below), yielding a roof pixel area of ~195 × 195 px. At 0.035318 sq ft per sq px, this produces ~1,343 sq ft, rounded to 1,340 sq ft. The roof is a near-square hip structure (~36.5 ft × 36.6 ft) consistent with the identical neighboring units, each displaying a characteristic X/hip-roof pattern from above. One valley (~16 ft) is estimated where a front bump-out section meets the main roof plane. There are no rake edges (fully hipped). The ridge is short (~19 ft) due to the near-square plan. Four hip lines total ~75 ft. The eave runs the full perimeter at ~146 ft. Confidence is moderate-low (0.48) due to image resolution, shadow overlap from surrounding trees, and the difficulty distinguishing valleys from shadows at this scale.

condition.rationale: The subject roof within the orange bounding box is a hip-style roof with what appears to be dark gray asphalt shingles. The surface color is uniform across all visible slopes — no color breaks, mismatched patches, or discoloration streaks are present. Ridge and hip lines appear geometrically straight with no visible sag. There are no blue or brown tarps, no obvious large-area missing shingle sections exposing decking, no green biological growth, and no foreign debris on the roof surface. Compared to the immediately adjacent identical townhouse units, the subject roof shows the same consistent shingle tone and surface texture, indicating no notable anomalies. Image quality and viewing angle are sufficient to assess the visible slopes reliably. No findings meet the confidence threshold for reporting.

fence_reason: vision roof area 1675 differs from solar 2081 by 19.5% (>12%)
